tree.name: Isaiah Stewart
tree.tradeDescription: DET signed Christian Wood then traded him, a 2021 2nd round draft pick (Luka Garza), and a 2025 1st round draft pick (Joan Beringer) to HOU for Trevor Ariza, Isaiah Stewart, cash, and a 2027 2nd round draft pick

assetsGivenUp.name: Christian Wood
assetsGivenUp.note: Signed as undrafted free agent. Played one season for Detroit before being traded to Houston in the Isaiah Stewart deal.

assetsGivenUp.name: 2021 2nd Round Pick (#52)
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Detroit's own 2nd round pick sent to Houston

assetsGivenUp.name: 2025 1st Round Pick (#17)
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Detroit's own 1st round pick sent to Houston (conveyed in 2025)
